protocols.Paper_title: Endogenous RNase inhibitor contributes to stability of RNA in crude cell lysates: Applicability to RT-qPCR
protocols.Evidence: cells were washed twice with PBS and then exposed to CL Buffer (...0.25% Igepal CA-630...) for 5 min at room temperature (~22 C); lysates subjected to RT-qPCR
